import torch
from speechbrain.pretrained import SpectralMaskEnhancement
import sys

ckpt = 'pretrained_metricgan'
print('Loading model...')
model = SpectralMaskEnhancement.from_hparams(source=ckpt, savedir=ckpt)
print('Model type:', type(model))
print('Has modules:', hasattr(model, 'modules'))
if hasattr(model, 'modules'):
    print('Module keys:', list(model.modules.keys()))
if hasattr(model, 'hparams'):
    print('Hyperparams keys:', list(model.hparams.keys())[:20])

# Check differentiability of enhance_batch
wav = torch.randn(1, 16000, requires_grad=True)
try:
    out = model.enhance_batch(wav, lengths=torch.tensor([1.0]))
    if isinstance(out, tuple):
        out = out[0]
    print('Output shape:', out.shape)
    print('requires_grad:', out.requires_grad)
    print('grad_fn:', out.grad_fn)
    loss = out.mean()
    loss.backward()
    print('Backward succeeded, wav.grad exists:', wav.grad is not None)
except Exception as e:
    print('Error during enhance_batch/backward:', e)

# Count params
total = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
trainable = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad)
print('Total params:', total)
print('Trainable params:', trainable)
